verdict: Playable and cleanly swept, but far too simple and uniform for an Overdrive chart, completely lacking holds.

issues.problem: The density is extremely low for the highest difficulty (Overdrive), consisting of basic single-tap streams with no multi-note chords or complex rhythms.
There are zero sustain/hold notes mapped. In synthwave, mapping long synth pads and sweeping basslines as holds is essential for gameplay feel.
The outro section fails to contrast with the drop. It maintains the exact same note density and zig-zag lane-movement patterns, leading to repetitive gameplay.
